PluginData.Author: CometWorks
PluginData.Tooltip: Non-Steam direct UDP multiplayer transport (dedicated server)
PluginData.Description: Lets a Space Engineers dedicated server accept clients over raw UDP without Steam, for headless multi-client test setups (functional and load testing). Activated by the SE_DIRECT_TRANSPORT environment variable (1/true/yes/on). Admits clients without Steam authentication. Requires the matching DirectTransport (Client) plugin on each client with --connect and --client-id parameters specified.
